rules.description: Produce the most natural-sounding translation and capture intended meaning in natural language suited to a wide Italian-speaking audience
rules.notes: Avoid literal transposition of English syntax. Balance faithfulness to source and readability in target language.

rules.description: Use clear and precise style that is easily understood and does not read like a translation
rules.notes: Avoid heaviness, ambiguities, repetitions and Anglicism. Avoid enriching the text excessively.

rules.description: Translate buttons as imperative 2nd person singular form (tu), be concise, avoid articles or prepositions
rules.notes: Pay attention to character/space limitations

rules.description: Use imperative form without articles for file operations
Use imperative singular form for skip actions

rules.section: Names of RingCentral Products, Applications and Features
rules.description: Check reference material and linguistic instructions including terminology lists before translating product/application names
rules.notes: Many product/application names are trademarked and not localizable

rules.description: Replace English examples with Italian equivalents when needed
rules.notes: Particularly important for wildcards and technical examples

rules.description: Be precise, clear, consistent and natural; rephrase unclear sentences and break up long sentences
Use accurate and concise style with no ambiguities or mistranslations
Write clearly and coherently so target reader understands text easily
Be objective and neutral; do not insert personal opinions, avoid colloquial or slang words, be politically correct
Ensure content and numbers are correct and free of mistakes
Use idiomatically correct verbs, metaphors, expressions so text does not sound like a translation
Be complete and do not leave out content (words, phrases, whole paragraphs)
Keep target reader in mind and use appropriate tone
Reference cross-references consistently throughout translation and match approved translations for external cross-references
rules.notes: Check if documents have been localized before; leave untranslated if no approved version exists

rules.description: Be more direct than English and use imperative form instead of over-polite constructions
rules.example_incorrect: Si prega di inserire il nome utente.
rules.notes: Italian does not require the same caution as English

rules.description: Use masculine forms as priority unless context requires otherwise; find neutral forms where possible and avoid stereotypes
rules.example_correct: Il team dell'assistenza contatterà il cliente per informarlo.
rules.example_incorrect: Il team dell'assistenza contatterà il cliente per informarlo/a.
rules.notes: Balance bias-free language with fluency

rules.description: Avoid passive voice when possible; use active form to improve readability
rules.example_correct: Questo capitolo fornisce tutti i dettagli.
rules.example_incorrect: Tutti i dettagli sono forniti in questo capitolo.
rules.notes: Passive voice only advised for non-human subjects like software/products and in legal documents

rules.description: Use active voice for describing features and functionality
rules.example_correct: Questo white paper descrive alcune nuove funzionalità.
rules.example_incorrect: Alcune funzionalità nuove sono descritte in questo white paper.

rules.description: Use passive voice appropriately for software limitations
rules.example_correct: Questo elemento non può essere eliminato dal software.
rules.example_incorrect: Il software non può eliminare questo elemento.
rules.notes: Acceptable to avoid personalization of non-human items

rules.description: Do not transfer extensive use of English possessive adjectives; replace with brand names where appropriate
rules.notes: In some cases 'our' refers to subject and can be replaced by brand name

rules.description: Replace possessive adjectives with simple articles when appropriate
rules.example_correct: Puoi modificare i file sia dal computer che dal dispositivo mobile.
rules.example_incorrect: Puoi modificare i tuoi file sia sul tuo computer sia sul tuo dispositivo mobile.

rules.description: Use 'dell'utente' in impersonal style instead of possessive adjectives
rules.example_correct: È possibile modificare i file sia dal computer che dal dispositivo mobile dell'utente.
rules.example_incorrect: Puoi modificare i tuoi file sia sul tuo computer sia sul tuo dispositivo mobile.

rules.description: Use 'il' with masculine foreign words
rules.example_correct: il browser, il cloud, il firewall, il download, il server, il touch screen, il webcast, il malware, il mouse, il file system, il backup

rules.description: Use 'la' with feminine foreign words
rules.example_correct: la home page, la cache, la chat, la directory, la RAM

rules.description: Translate -ing forms using most appropriate option: verb, noun, infinitive clause based on context
rules.example_correct: I nostri controller sono dotati di una cache per proteggere l'integrità dei dati

rules.description: Use relative clause as alternative for -ing forms
rules.example_correct: I nostri controller sono dotati di una cache che protegge l'integrità dei dati

rules.description: Use gerund form appropriately for -ing constructions
rules.example_correct: Accedendo a questo sito web, l'utente accetta i termini e le condizioni...

rules.description: Check context, concentrate on meaning and render as clearly as possible; avoid unnecessary words
rules.example_correct: Il nome, l'indirizzo di posta elettronica e il nome dell'azienda
rules.example_incorrect: Il nome dell'utente, l'indirizzo di posta elettronica dell'utente e il nome dell'azienda dell'utente

rules.description: Eliminate redundant phrases
rules.example_incorrect: Questo significa che ora è possibile…

rules.description: Avoid repetitions that are acceptable in English but not in Italian; use pronouns or other techniques
rules.example_correct: Per eliminare un file dal computer, selezionarlo nel riquadro a destra e fare clic su Elimina
rules.example_incorrect: Per eliminare un file dal computer, selezionare il file dal riquadro a destra e fare clic su Elimina

rules.description: Use 'annulla' instead of 'cancella' for 'cancel'
Use 'serie/gamma' instead of 'varietà' for 'variety'
Use 'settore' instead of 'industria' for 'industry'
Use 'andare perso/perdere' instead of 'rimborsare/dare a forfait' for 'forfeit'
Use 'effettivo' instead of 'attuale' for 'actual'
Use 'avvicinarsi' instead of 'approcciare' for 'approach'
Use 'biblioteca' instead of 'libreria' for 'library'
Use 'elaborare' instead of 'processare' for 'process'
Use 'in realtà, effettivamente' instead of 'attualmente' for 'actually'
Use 'capire' instead of 'realizzare' for 'realize'
Use 'pubblicizzare' instead of 'avvertire' for 'to advertise'
Use 'consiglio' instead of 'avviso' for 'advice'
Use 'aiutare' instead of 'assistere' for 'to assist'
Use 'atteggiamento' instead of 'attitudine' for 'attitude'
Use 'pubblico' instead of 'udienza' for 'audience'
Use 'istruzione' instead of 'educazione' for 'education'
Use 'fabbrica' instead of 'fattoria' for 'factory'
Use 'sofferenza' instead of 'miseria' for 'misery'
Use 'vuoto, posto vacante' instead of 'vacanza' for 'vacancy'
Use RingCentral Glossary as first and binding source for technical terms
For terms not in glossary, use Microsoft standard terminology where applicable
rules.notes: Reference: https://www.microsoft.com/it-it/language

rules.description: Use available online resources like Wikipedia, administrator web pages, large IT vendor portals
Capitalize proper names, product names, and geographical names
Capitalize first word after period, exclamation mark, question mark, ellipsis
In titles and headings, only capitalize first character of first word
UI items begin with uppercase character; for multiple words, only first character of first word is uppercase
For UI items with two alternative commands separated by slash, both commands begin with uppercase
Write keyboard key names in all capital letters
Use lowercase for nationalities, languages, religions, days of week, months, seasons and currencies
Use lowercase for currency names
Use lowercase for language names
Use lowercase for nationality adjectives
For UI items with multiple words, only first word is capitalized
In legal texts, retain capitalization as it conveys specific meaning
rules.example_correct: Questo accordo (l'"Accordo") è un accordo vincolante
rules.example_incorrect: Questo accordo (l'"accordo") è un accordo vincolante
rules.notes: Exception to general capitalization rules

rules.description: Preserve all uppercase formatting in legal texts
rules.example_correct: INSTALLARE E UTILIZZARE UNA COPIA DEL SOFTWARE
rules.example_incorrect: Installare e utilizzare una copia del Software
rules.notes: Whole paragraphs in uppercase must be preserved for legal implications

rules.description: Use ASCII codes for accented capital letters: À (Alt+0192), È (Alt+0200), Ì (Alt+0204), Í (Alt+0205), Ò (Alt+0210)
Run spell-checker when translation is completed; use MS Word spellchecker rather than CAT tool embedded checkers
rules.notes: MS Word is more reliable than CAT tool spell-checkers

rules.description: Separate brand name tags from preceding or following text with a space
Use no space before any punctuation sign in Italian
Replace double spaces after full stops with single spaces
rules.notes: Use controlled search and replace

rules.description: Use non-breaking spaces to prevent separation of names, numbers, software names and versions at line end
rules.notes: Use Ctrl + Shift + Space bar in MS Word or Alt+0160

rules.description: Use space before degree symbol
rules.notes: Can also use: Temperatura di 20° C

rules.description: Use no space before percentage symbol
Use space before unit abbreviations for length
Use space before unit abbreviations for weight
Never separate subject from verb with a comma
Avoid using comma after 'e', 'o' or 'oppure' unless needed for aside or natural pause
Do not use comma before last element of enumeration
rules.notes: Contrary to English usage

rules.description: When sentence is between brackets or quotes, place period outside
Do not use full stops after headings, titles, table columns, or captions unless it's a full sentence
Do not use full stops if sentence ends with abbreviation, question mark, exclamation mark, ellipsis, or colon
Avoid using colons as English makes wider use; prefer commas where possible
Use colons to introduce listings, procedures or notes
rules.example_correct: Di seguito un elenco delle funzionalità della nuova release:

rules.description: Term following colon must be lowercase unless placed on another line
rules.example_correct: Le caratteristiche del prodotto includono: scalabilità, upgrade senza interruzioni delle attività, controlli automatici e reversibilità dei contenuti.

rules.description: Use semi-colons less than in English; mainly for separating items in enumeration when commas would be confusing
rules.notes: As general rule, avoid semi-colons and start new sentence instead

rules.description: Never use capital initial letter after semi-colon
Avoid question marks as they are much less used in Italian than English
Replace question mark headings with descriptive terms
Question marks can be used for rhetorical questions in marketing content if appropriate for text type and audience
rules.example_correct: Vuoi saperne di più su questa tecnologia? Scarica il web cast.
rules.notes: Appropriate for brochures, CTA, banners etc.

rules.description: Capitalize any term following question mark
Do not add period after question mark to avoid double punctuation
Exclamation marks are less common in Italian than English; remove unless appropriate for text type, register and audience
When exclamation marks appear in groups, keep only one
Use hyphen (-) to divide words between syllables and link parts of compound words
Use n dash (–) (ALT + 0150) to divide two concepts in heading/title and open/close asides
rules.notes: Use commas instead of dashes if possible

rules.description: Do not use hyphen to introduce lists; use colon instead
Do not use m dash in Italian; replace with n dash if needed
Use round brackets as standard in Italian; square brackets only for specific requirements
rules.notes: Square brackets for specific examples taken from source

rules.description: Use no space between brackets and text inside them
Use parentheses less than in English; consider replacing with commas for asides
Never use straight single quote for variables
rules.notes: Updated 20241207

rules.description: Use double quotes in Italian; avoid single quotes unless forced by software requirements
Place punctuation outside quotes
rules.example_correct: Per ulteriori informazioni sulla procedura di riqualifica consultare la sezione "Riqualifica dell'account".

rules.description: Do not use quotation marks to stress terms; use italics instead unless problematic due to tool limitations
Use straight apostrophe consistently instead of curly apostrophe

rules.section: Style to use in bulleted lists
rules.description: If bulleted items are complete sentences with conjugated verb, begin with capital and end with period
rules.example_correct: La nuova procedura permette di: • Aprire il file in modalità di sola lettura. • Eliminare i file pregressi inutilizzati da tempo.

rules.section: Style to use in bulleted lists
rules.description: If bulleted items are phrases or single words, do not follow with period
rules.example_correct: La nuova versione dispone di: • Nuovo hardware • Firmware aggiornato

rules.section: Style to use in bulleted lists
rules.description: If list items depend syntactically on introductory sentence, start with lowercase, end with semicolon, use period for last item
rules.notes: This format tends to be less used nowadays, especially in IT translations

rules.description: Avoid abbreviations when possible; if needed, shorten by at least two letters, end with consonant and period
rules.notes: For double consonants, abbreviate after second consonant

rules.description: Use standard abbreviations: articolo = art., circa = ca., confronta = cfr., eccetera = ecc.
Use standard units: centimetro = cm, grammo = g, gigabyte = GB, Gigahertz = GHz, ora = h
Use document references: numero = n., pagina = p., pagine = pp., capitolo = cap., paragrafo = par., sezione = sez.
rules.example_correct: n., p., pp., cap., par., sez.

rules.description: Translation of acronyms depends on RingCentral project requirements; always investigate localizability
Acronym gender and number depend on translation of governing noun in extended form
Write numbers in full when used as nouns, appearing alone as simple quantities (usually up to 9), and in expressions like 'in the 80s'
Write dates, large numbers, ages, document references as numbers
Replace decimal point with comma and thousand separator with dot
Use dot as thousand separator
Format large numbers correctly with dots and commas
Separate units of measure from preceding number with non-breaking space
Convert imperial units to metric based on project requirements: 1 inch = 2,54 cm, 1 foot = 30,48 cm
rules.notes: Monitor sizes remain in inches as exception

rules.description: Use correct Italian abbreviations: chilometro = km, metro = m, litro = l, chilogrammo = kg
Write percentages in figures followed by % symbol with no space between figure and symbol
Use Italian date format: day-month instead of month-day
Use DD/MM/YYYY or DD-MM-YYYY for short date format
Use dddd d MMMM yyyy for long date format
Use hh.mm.ss format with 24-hour clock
Format time ranges using 24-hour format
Use lowercase month names without capitalization: gennaio, febbraio, marzo, aprile, maggio, giugno
rules.example_correct: gennaio, febbraio, marzo, aprile, maggio, giugno
rules.example_incorrect: Gennaio, Febbraio, Marzo, Aprile, Maggio, Giugno

rules.description: Use standard month abbreviations: gen, feb, mar, apr, mag, giu, lug, ago, set, ott, nov, dic
rules.example_correct: gen, feb, mar, apr, mag, giu, lug, ago, set, ott, nov, dic

rules.description: Place currency symbols after numeral separated by non-breaking space with two decimal figures
Use 'Informazioni su' for 'about'
Use 'Come mostrato nella figura xx' for 'as shown in figure xx'
Use 'Per ulteriori informazioni su xxx, consultare xxx.' for 'For more information on xxx, see xxx.'
rules.example_correct: Per ulteriori informazioni su xxx, consultare xxx.

rules.description: Use 'N/D (non disponibile)' for 'N/A (Non Available)'
Use 'Tenere presente che' for 'Please note that'
Use 'marchio registrato' for 'registered trademark'
Use 'risoluzione dei problemi' for 'troubleshooting'
Use 'marchio, marchio commerciale' for 'trademark'
Use 'Manuale dell'utente' for 'User's Guide'
Use 'consigliamo di…' for 'we recommend…'
Use 'Attenersi alla seguente procedura per xxx' for 'Follow these steps to xxx'
rules.example_correct: Attenersi alla seguente procedura per xxx

rules.description: Use trademark and registered trademark symbols only on first mention in translated content unless otherwise indicated
rules.notes: Refer to most updated RingCentral term list

rules.section: Third Party Trademarks and Product Names
rules.description: Follow localized equivalence in official websites for third party product names if available

rules.section: Third Party Trademarks and Product Names
rules.description: Complete extensive research to determine if official approved trademarked translated version exists before using source
rules.notes: Reference Adobe, Apple, Google, Microsoft trademark lists
